body.title: Structure /ticket template: test plan, affected files, design rules, scope
body.result: /ticket SKILL.md new Description template section + Step 2 prompts for Affected files, Design rules, Scope boundary, Test plan. Labeled-text sections in description; no DB schema change. Commit 0a38873c. Dispatch: Haiku subagent executed the SKILL.md rewrite.
body.description:
Rework the /ticket skill and the draft JSON schema so filing prompts for structured fields instead of a free-form description. New fields: test_plan, affected_files, applicable_design_rules, scope_boundary.

Scope boundary: do NOT modify the cc_queue.py DB row schema. Structure lives inside description-as-structured-text (or a parallel JSON payload in the description). This is a skill + filing-flow change, not a schema migration.

Why: design rules do not scaffold unless the drafter is prompted to address them at the moment of filing. Free-form description lets the drafter skip the check.

Gated on T-palace-ticket-design-rules: applicable_design_rules field needs check-shaped palace entries to point at.

test_plan: file a ticket via /ticket, confirm new fields present; file one leaving fields empty, confirm flow prompts or warns.
